message:
Harden file operations, improve UI resilience, and fix e2e test flakiness

- Add sync_parent_directory call after file restoration in replace_file_from_temp
  to ensure filesystem consistency on crash recovery
- Improve refresh ledger test assertions to use timestamp comparison instead
  of fragile duration > 0 checks
- Add robust error handling with user-facing notifications across export,
  key management, profiles, source config, and sync pages
- Implement debounced search input, keyboard shortcut resilience, and
  improved focus management in the main app UI
- Add retry logic with exponential backoff to flaky e2e tests for search
  and touch-navigation specs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
